title: Professional Experience
text:
California High-Speed Rail Authority (CHSRA) Aug 2024 – Dec 2024

Cleaned and structured educational data from 38 U.S. universities using Excel.
Developed interactive Tableau dashboards covering 6 job categories and 55 skill areas to support workforce planning.
Evaluated skill coverage and training readiness across academic programs.
Recommended outreach and partnership strategies for underrepresented job types and regions.
